headline: Bank of America Trims Paramount Skydance Corporation (PSKY) PT, Cites Long-Term Restructuring Process
summary: Paramount Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ:PSKY) is one of the best Robinhood stocks on this list. TheFly reported on March 10 that Bank of America reduced its price target for PSKY to $11 from $13 while keeping an Underperform rating on the shares. The firm observes that PSKY, especially after its merger with Warner Bros. Discovery, has […]
